name: Sword Hit
description: a sharp metallic clang of a sword striking a target
usage: Sword connecting with an enemy or object.

ai.prompt: A steel sword striking metal armor: a bright, heavy metallic clang with a sharp transient and a short ringing tail, forceful impact. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.

variation.note: repeating sound — game MUST round-robin + jitter every play
